case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. FIDEL ALFONSO MIAM MAGANA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAGANA, FIDEL ALFONSO MIAM $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN, INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MAGANA, FIDEL ALFONSO MIAM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MAGANA, FIDEL ALFONSO MIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FIDEL ALFONSO MIAM MAGANA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JUL-17-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MAGANA, FIDEL ALFONSO MIAM
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
